title: Sun Sheep's tool
description:
添加了一些具有特殊效果的武器
Added some weapons with special effects.
body:
添加了一些武器，可以帮助你在战斗中获得更好的优势！
Added some weapons that can help you gain a better advantage in battles!
白金之星:没有攻击冷却且无视无敌帧的攻击！
白金雷暴之星：有白金之星的所有效果，并且攻击有概率触发雷暴！
阳剑：攻击后让天空晴朗！
雨剑：攻击后天气变为下雨
雷雨剑：攻击后天气变为雷暴！
经验剑：根据攻击伤害给予你经验！
史莱姆剑：可以击飞对手！
史莱姆盾牌：可以切换开关【粘液守护】   开:回复格挡伤害的一半血量并根据回复血量消耗大量耐久      关：回复格挡伤害的一些耐久
锁链剑：攻击可以禁锢敌人！
连杀剑：击杀敌人可以增加攻击伤害和攻击速度！    连杀超过5后增加一些攻击距离！     被攻击后增加的效果清零
锈蚀铜剑：攻击施加【破伤风】    根据敌人最大血量扣除百分比血量 扣除的最大血量有一定限制    [对应附魔:伤口开裂    增加【破伤风】扣除血量的百分比并增加持续时间！]
傻瓜剑：攻击短暂消除敌人ai
斩首剑：可以砍下部分生物的头颅！
音律长笛：具有四种形态 切换到特定形态右键会给予自己对应效果  1.持续对敌人造成伤害！  2.自身获得跳跃提升、速度   3.持续将敌人向视角方向击退   4.持续恢复自身血量
沉默之剑：攻击时施加沉默：无法对任何生物造成伤害
生命狂舞之剑：按住右键时持续消耗自身血量充能大剑，消耗的血量不会致命    蓄力期间不会受到伤害！     放开后，对周围造成大量伤害！

Platinum Star: Attack without cooldown and ignoring invincible frames!
Platinum Thunderstorm Star: Has all the effects of Platinum Star, and attacks have a chance to trigger thunderstorms!
Sun Sword: Make the sky clear after attacking!
Rain Sword: The weather changes to rain after the attack
Thunderstorm Sword: The weather turns into thunderstorms after the attack!
Experience Sword: Provides you with experience based on attack damage!
Slime Sword: Can knock away opponents!
Slime Shield: can switch the switch 【 Slime Guardian 】 On: restores half of the health of the block damage and consumes a large amount of durability based on the restored health. Off: restores some durability of the block damage
Chain Sword: Attack can imprison enemies!
Continuous Kill Sword: Killing enemies can increase attack damage and attack speed! Increase attack distance after killing more than 5 in a row! The effect increased after being attacked is reset to zero
Rusted Copper Sword: Attack applies 【Tetanus】. The maximum amount of health deducted based on the enemy's maximum health is limited by the percentage of health deducted. [Corresponding Enchantment: When the wound cracks, increase the percentage of health deducted by 【Tetanus】 and increase the duration!]
Foolish Sword: Attack briefly to eliminate enemy AI
Beheading Sword: It can cut off the heads of some creatures!
Melody flute: It has four forms. Switching to a specific form with the right button will give you corresponding effects. 1. Continuously deal damage to enemies! 2. Gain jump improvement and speed on your own. 3. Continuously repel enemies in the direction of the field of view. 4. Continuously restore your own health
Silent Sword: Apply silence during attack: Cannot cause damage to any creature
Sword of Life Dance: Press and hold the right button to continuously consume your own health and charge the sword. The consumed health will not be fatal, and you will not be harmed during the charging period! After letting go, it will cause a lot of damage to the surroundings!
